tasks.label: Kill Port 3000
tasks.command: Stop-Process -Id (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen).OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Host 'Port 3000 freed'

tasks.label: Dev Server Port 3000
tasks.command: Stop-Process -Id (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; npm run dev

tasks.label: Clean Restart Dev
tasks.command: Stop-Process -Id (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host 'Cleaned'; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; npm run dev
